**Briefly describe your idea**
e.g this project needs a fast job queue system

**What you think would be a great solution**
e.g Chase-lev dequeue lock-free design like this: https://github.com/ricknijhuis/LibZ.Jobs

**Additional information about your proposition**
write anything you want to say about your idea here.
